title: rubus × abortivus
intro: Rubus × abortivus, also known as the dwarf thimbleberry or abortive raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, characterized by its unique thimble-shaped fruit. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of anthocyanins and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus × abortivus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as dried and used in capsule or powder form to harness its potential health benefits.
